description: A policyholder's car has a flat tire and they are calling to use their roadside assistance coverage.

nodes.task_description: Identify the policyholder and verify they have roadside assistance coverage.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the customer and their active coverage.

nodes.task_description: Gather the customer's location and the nature of the problem (flat tire).

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately records the location and service needed.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a tow truck from a local network provider and give the customer an estimated time of arrival.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully dispatches a service vehicle and provides an accurate ETA.
